description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Lint that can be called with two string inputs: dfhack_ref and scripts_ref. The workflow runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, installs Lua, clones the DFHack repository at the specified ref, and clones the scripts repository either at the specified ref or at the ref of the scripts submodule. It then performs several linting tasks: checking whitespace, validating Authors.rst, detecting missing documentation, and verifying Lua syntax.
